title: acalypha indica var. minima
intro: Acalypha indica var. minima, also known as the Dwarf Copperleaf or Small Copper Leaf, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Acalypha indica var. minima is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and poultices to treat various health issues.
